title: Hematoxylin and Eosin Staining Protocol
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"wQ0E3","text":"STEP MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"Hxp7B","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"Rxw5M","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":5182,"guid":"410836A0341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"1L Mayer's Hematoxylin Solution, Modified","mol_weight":0,"sku":"786-1264","url":"https://www.gbiosciences.com/mayers_hematoxylin_solution\r","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":105,"name":"G-Biosciences","link":"http://www.gbiosciences.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":232974,"guid":"41EA6C0D341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Shandon\u0026trade; Eosin Y Cytoplasmic Counterstain, Alcoholic","mol_weight":0,"sku":"6766007","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/6766007","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":440,"name":"Thermo Fisher","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/440.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/440.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Prepare 95% ETOH in slide staining apparatus Heomtoxylin in slide staining apparatus Eosin in slide staining apparatus
Stain in Mayer's Hematoxylin 1L Mayer's Hematoxylin Solution, Modified G-Biosciences Catalog #786-1264
Rinse slides 3X 15 min in tap water - if tap water is acidic, prepare Scott's tap water recipe in sigma insert
Place in Eosin Y for 1 min Shandon™ Eosin Y Cytoplasmic Counterstain, Alcoholic Thermo Fisher Catalog #6766007
Dehydrate and clear through 2 changes each  95% Ethanol 2 minutes  100% Ethanol 2 minutes  Xylene ( Histoclear as a substitute ) EMS Cat# 64114
Mount with resinous mounting medium 200ul / slide.
creator: Sierra Simpson
